entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop of the study

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function under high temperature stress

entities.name: HEAT SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The susceptibility of a plant to damage under high temperature stress

entities.name: ICC16374
entities.description: A heat-sensitive genotype of chickpea

entities.name: JG14
entities.description: A heat-tolerant genotype of chickpea

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: High temperature conditions imposed on the plants

entities.name: ANTHESIS
entities.description: The period during which a flower is fully open and functional

entities.name: LEAF WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water present in the leaves

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of chlorophyll present in the leaves

entities.name: MEMBRANE INTEGRITY
entities.description: The structural stability of cellular membranes

entities.name: TOTAL ANTIOXIDANT CAPACITY
entities.description: The overall ability of the plant to neutralize reactive oxygen species

entities.name: OSMOLYTE ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The buildup of small organic molecules to maintain osmotic balance

entities.name: OXIDATIVE DAMAGE
entities.description: Damage caused by reactive oxygen species to cellular components

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GEL-FREE PROTEOMICS
entities.description: A proteomic analysis technique used to identify proteins without using gels

entities.name: HEAT-RESPONSIVE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins whose expression levels change in response to heat stress

entities.name: HEAT SHOCK PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins produced by cells in response to exposure to stressful conditions

entities.name: ACETYL-COA CARBOXYLASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in fatty acid biosynthesis

entities.name: PYRROLINE-5-CARBOXYLATE SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme involved in proline biosynthesis

entities.name: RUBISCO
entities.description: The enzyme that catalyzes the first step of carbon fixation

entities.name: PHENYLALANINE AMMONIA-LYASE 2
entities.description: An enzyme involved in the phenylpropanoid pathway

entities.name: ATP SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme that creates the energy storage molecule ATP

entities.name: GLYCOSYLTRANSFERASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the transfer of a sugar moiety

entities.name: SUCROSE SYNTHASE
entities.description: An enzyme that catalyzes the synthesis or breakdown of sucrose

entities.name: LEA PROTEINS
entities.description: Late embryogenesis abundant proteins that protect other proteins from aggregation

entities.name: COMPARATIVE PROTEOME PROFILING
entities.description: The process of comparing the protein expression profiles of different samples

entities.name: PATHWAY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of biological pathways to understand the function of identified proteins

entities.name: OSMOPROTECTANT ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The process of accumulating solutes to protect cells from osmotic stress

entities.name: PROTECTED MEMBRANE TRANSPORT
entities.description: Mechanisms that maintain the selective permeability of membranes under stress

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITE SYNTHESIS
entities.description: The production of organic compounds not directly involved in growth or development

entities.name: ANTIOXIDANT ACTIVATION
entities.description: The triggering of antioxidant defense systems

entities.name: AMINO ACID BIOSYNTHESIS
entities.description: The biological production of amino acids

entities.name: HORMONAL MODULATION
entities.description: The regulation of plant hormones to respond to stress
